classes.name: DemoListLinePlot
classes.doc: Stateless: render full ``time``/``value`` trajectories as one line.

classes.name: DemoMultiTimeSeriesPlot
classes.doc: Accumulate a ``list[float]`` per step; render one line per element.

classes.name: DemoTimeSeriesPlot
classes.doc: Accumulate a scalar ``value`` per step; render value-vs-step line plot.

classes.name: Heatmap
classes.doc: Color matrix over a 2D parameter sweep.

classes.name: ParamVsObservable
classes.doc: Plot reduced observable values across a sweep.

classes.name: SpeciesTimeSeriesPlots
classes.doc: Time-series HTML plot of TelluriumProcess's species concentrations.

classes.name: TimeSeriesPlot
classes.doc: Plot one or more observables vs time.
